title: Also delete winsz fifo
body:
In conmon 2.0.3, we add another fifo to handle window resizing. This needs to be cleaned up for commands like restore, where the same path is used.

fixes: https://github.com/containers/conmon/issues/85 

Signed-off-by: Peter Hunt <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@haircommander Thanks!

LGTM Just like the ctl pipe.

Were hoping to cut a release this week.
